page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg9i.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. The instance is configured with 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 8 physical cores, resulting in 1.0 thread per core. This dedicated CPU allocation ensures that compute resources are not shared with other tenants, providing consistent processing performance.

The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, which translates to 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external block storage volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 8 Gbps. There are no complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this instance type, and it does not feature any GPU acceleration.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high clock speed position this server as a premium general-purpose option. The 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio offers a balanced resource density for workloads requiring predictable CPU performance without the overhead of hyperthreading. However, the lack of local storage requires architectural planning for external disk attachments, which may introduce latency tradeoffs depending on the storage tier selected. This instance is suited for application servers, web serving, medium-sized databases, and general-purpose enterprise workloads that demand stable, non-burstable CPU performance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg9i.2xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor with 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs, running at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz with no hyperthreading. The hardware configuration includes 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on external network-attached storage. It offers a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent, non-shared compute performance, making it qualitatively cost-effective for workloads requiring predictable execution. The ecs.hfg9i.2xlarge is suited for general-purpose enterprise applications, web serving, and database workloads that benefit from high clock speeds and dedicated compute resources.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg9i.2xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores at 3.4 GHz, 32 GB RAM, and 8 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for predictable general-purpose workloads.

tagline: A dedicated eight-core Intel Xeon server with balanced memory and baseline network performance for predictable general-purpose workloads.

32.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
No local storage included, requiring external block storage
KVM hypervisor with dedicated, non-shared CPU allocation
Suited for web serving, application servers, and databases
